hooks.command: file_path=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.path // empty'); if [ -n "$file_path" ] && echo "$file_path" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx|json|md)$'; then npx prettier --write "$file_path" 2>/dev/null || true; fi

file_path=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.path // empty'); if [ -n "$file_path" ] && echo "$file_path" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)$'; then npx eslint --fix "$file_path" 2>/dev/null || true; fi

file_path=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.path // empty'); if [ -z "$file_path" ] || ! echo "$file_path" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)$'; then exit 0; fi; if echo "$file_path" | grep -qE '\.(test|spec)\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)$'; then exit 0; fi; if echo "$file_path" | grep -qE '(config|setup|\.d\.ts)'; then exit 0; fi; dir=$(dirname "$file_path"); base=$(basename "$file_path"); name="${base%.*}"; ext="${base##*.}"; test_file=''; for candidate in "$dir/$name.test.$ext" "$dir/$name.spec.$ext" "$dir/__tests__/$name.test.$ext" "$dir/__tests__/$name.spec.$ext"; do if [ -f "$candidate" ]; then test_file="$candidate"; break; fi; done; if [ -z "$test_file" ]; then echo "⚠️  No test file found for $file_path. Add a test at $dir/$name.test.$ext"; exit 0; fi; echo "🧪 Running test: $test_file"; result=$(bunx vitest run "$test_file" 2>&1); status=$?; if [ $status -ne 0 ]; then echo "❌ Test failed: $test_file"; echo "$result" | tail -30; exit 1; else echo "✅ Test passed: $test_file"; fi
cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '^git commit'; then npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | head -20 || true; fi
cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '^git commit'; then bun test --passWithNoTests 2>&1 | tail -20 || true; fi

cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '^git commit'; then if git diff --cached --name-only | grep -qE '(auth|api|action|middleware|webhook)'; then echo '⚠️  SECURITY-SENSITIVE FILES IN COMMIT - verify: auth checks, input validation, no secrets'; fi; fi

cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '^(bun add|npm install)'; then echo "$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M') - Dependency installed: $cmd" >> progress/build-log.md 2>/dev/null || true; fi

cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '^(bun add|npm install)'; then echo '🔒 Running security audit...' && (bun audit 2>/dev/null || npm audit --audit-level=high 2>/dev/null || echo 'Audit not available'); fi

file_path=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.path // empty'); if echo "$file_path" | grep -qE '(\.env|\.git/|package-lock\.json|bun\.lockb)'; then echo '❌ BLOCKED: Cannot edit protected file: '$file_path >&2 && exit 1; fi; exit 0

cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '^git commit'; then if git diff --cached | grep -qiE '(api[_-]?key|secret[_-]?key|password|token|credential)\s*[=:]'; then echo '❌ BLOCKED: Potential secret detected in commit. Remove hardcoded credentials.' >&2 && exit 1; fi; fi; exit 0

cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '^git push.*(prod|origin.*prod)'; then echo '❌ BLOCKED: Cannot push to prod branch. Production deploys are human-only.' >&2 && exit 1; fi; exit 0

cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '^git (merge.*prod|checkout prod)'; then echo '❌ BLOCKED: Cannot merge to or checkout prod branch. Production is human-only.' >&2 && exit 1; fi; exit 0

cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if [ -f bun.lockb ] && echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '^npm (install|i|add|ci)'; then echo '❌ BLOCKED: Use bun instead of npm in this project' >&2 && exit 1; fi; exit 0

cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '^git push'; then echo '🔍 Running pre-push checks...' && npm run lint && npm run build || (echo '❌ BLOCKED: Fix lint/build errors before pushing' >&2 && exit 1); fi; exit 0
echo '🧪 Running tests before PR creation...' && bun test --passWithNoTests || (echo '❌ BLOCKED: Tests must pass before creating PR' >&2 && exit 1)

customInstructions: You are building a CAIO incubator project. Follow the conventions in CLAUDE.md. When running /work, execute tickets continuously — do NOT stop between tickets. After completing and committing a ticket, immediately pick up the next TODO ticket. Only stop when: all tickets are DONE, all remaining tickets are BLOCKED, or a human interrupts. Use TDD. Never merge to prod. Surface decisions via /decision command. Commit after each completed ticket. For large features (L/XL), spawn a feature subagent in a worktree.
